languages.text: "Меня мучает вопрос... Зачем ты так громко разговариваешь?"
"I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"
languages.original_text: "Меня мучает вопрос... Зачем ты так громко разговариваешь?"

traits.locale_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"
"I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"
"I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

languages.text: 「1つだけ悩んでいることがある…なぜあなたはこんなに大きな声で話しているのか？」
languages.original_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

traits.locale_text: 「1つだけ悩んでいることがある…なぜあなたはこんなに大きな声で話しているのですか？」

languages.text: «Tengo una pregunta... ¿Por qué habla tan alto?».
languages.original_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

traits.locale_text: «Tengo una pregunta... ¿Por qué habla tan alto?».

languages.text: “有个问题一直困扰着我……你说话为什么这么大声？”
languages.original_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

traits.locale_text: “有个问题一直困扰着我……你说话为什么这么大声？”

languages.text: "Wisst Ihr, was ich mich frage? Warum sprecht Ihr so laut?"
languages.original_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

traits.locale_text: "Wisst Ihr, was ich mich frage? Warum sprecht Ihr so laut?"

languages.text: "Aklıma takılan bir soru var... Neden bu kadar yüksek sesle konuşuyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

traits.locale_text: "Aklıma takılan bir soru var... Neden bu kadar yüksek sesle konuşuyorsun?"

languages.text: « Une question me taraude… Pourquoi parlez-vous si fort ? »
languages.original_text: "I am plagued by one question... Why are you speaking so loudly?"

traits.locale_text: « Une question me taraude… Pourquoi parlez-vous si fort ? »
